data.title: A meme coin themed after Trump's second son Eric Trump is suspected to be a scam. Beware of Rug Pull risks
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: A meme coin "ERICTRUMP" themed after Eric Trump, the second son of Trump, appeared on the Solana Ecosystem Meme Coin Launch Platform Pump.fun. It has risen by more than 6,200% in the past 24 hours, which has aroused the vigilance of the crypto community. Blockchain data platform Bubblemaps published an article on the X platform, saying that it is very likely to be a scam to beware of the risk of rug pull.
Rug pull usually refers to the sudden withdrawal of liquidity or large-scale sell-off by token insiders, which often leads to a sharp drop in prices, making the tokens held by retail investors worthless. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: OpenAI to Host Live Stream on Research Preview
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI announced via its official X account that it will conduct a live stream in two hours. The content of the stream is hinted to be a 'low-key research preview.'

data.title: Apple expected to unveil AI roadmap in coming weeks, China will be key
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Wedbush analysts said in a research report that after Apple has dealt with most of the supply chain disruptions caused by the tariff war, it can now focus on announcing an artificial intelligence strategic roadmap that will lead to a "renaissance of growth." Apple is expected to announce Alibaba as its artificial intelligence partner in China before the Apple Developer Conference in June. This will lay the foundation for the global artificial intelligence strategy for the coming year, and China will be a key part of the growth puzzle. At the press conference, investors should hear more about the features Apple plans to launch and more news about Apple Intelligence. (Jinshi)

data.title: Benchmark: Cyberattacks and SEC investigations will not have a substantial impact on Coinbase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Benchmark senior equity research analyst Palmer said in a research report that Coinbase disclosed a major cybersecurity breach on Thursday and confirmed that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is investigating its past user indicators. This is in stark contrast to the news earlier this week that the company will join the S&P 500 index. Palmer believes that this cyber attack is more of a one-time event and the SEC's investigation is "nothing more than noise and is unlikely to have any substantial impact on any driver of the company's bullish thesis on the stock." (CoinDesk)

data.title: Coinbase Partners with Webull Pay to Enhance Crypto Trading and Custody Services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase officially announced a partnership with Webull Pay, which will use Coinbase's Crypto-as-a-Service (CaaS) platform to provide a number of functions including crypto trading, institutional-grade custody, USDC support and staking services.

data.title: LBank has launched AGT U-margined Perpetual Contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the AGT U-based perpetual contract at 18:45 (SGT) on May 16, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Bloomberg analyst: Whiskey maker Heritage's strategy of accepting Bitcoin payments is smart
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas wrote on the X platform that the whiskey maker Heritage accepts Bitcoin payments and deposits profits into the company's treasury. This strategy is wise. If a company plans to create a Bitcoin reserve, it might as well obtain Bitcoin by accepting Bitcoin payments, so that it can increase sales by having loyal Bitcoin fans buy your products because your company accepts Bitcoin.

data.title: Whale's Leveraged ETH Purchase Raises Liquidation Concerns
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a significant whale has utilized leverage to acquire 8,613 ETH, valued at $22.43 million, within the past hour. The average purchase price was $2,612.33 per ETH.

The whale has currently collateralized the 8,613 ETH to borrow 10 million USDT, maintaining a health factor of 1.86. If the price of ETH drops to $1,399, it will trigger liquidation.

data.title: SEC Chair Paul Atkins Addresses Financial Market Regulation Conference
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair Paul Atkins delivered the opening remarks at the 12th Annual Financial Market Regulation Conference today at 8:45 a.m. Eastern Time. The conference agenda includes four major themes: corporate finance, market microstructure, intermediaries, and asset management. The event is jointly hosted by the SEC and scholars from various universities. The conference, which is streamed live on the event's official website, focuses on enhancing transparency in financial markets, reforming information disclosure, and fostering regulatory innovation.

data.title: Whiskey Maker Heritage Embraces Bitcoin Payments
data.description: According to Odaily, Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas shared on the X platform that whiskey manufacturer Heritage has begun accepting Bitcoin payments and is depositing the profits into the company's treasury. Balchunas noted that this strategy is prudent. He suggested that if a company intends to build a Bitcoin reserve, acquiring Bitcoin through accepting it as payment can be beneficial. This approach allows Bitcoin enthusiasts to purchase products, potentially boosting sales as the company accepts Bitcoin.

data.title: Galaxy Digital CEO: Nasdaq listing was unfair, process extended by 1,320 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz said in an interview with CNBC that the company's listing process on Nasdaq was very bumpy, "feeling very un-American, unfair and infuriating." The process, which was originally supposed to take 45 to 90 days, was extended to 1,320 days. The transaction went through nine rounds of consultations with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. However, this ordeal did not defeat Galaxy, but made it stronger. After Galaxy is listed on Nasdaq, its fees are expected to drop by 40%. Mike Novogratz emphasized that Galaxy Digital's goal is to become a bridge between traditional finance and the crypto world to meet the growing needs of institutions. (CNBC)

data.title: Buffett exits crypto-friendly bank Nubank with $250 million in profit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has liquidated its shares in Brazilian digital bank Nu Holdings (Nubank's parent company), with a cumulative profit of approximately US$250 million. Although Nubank achieved strong profit growth in 2024 and the first quarter of 2025, the exit was not based on the company's performance, but was consistent with Berkshire Hathaway's broader financial sector divestment strategy. In the first quarter of 2025, the company also sold all of its shares in Citigroup and reduced its holdings in Bank of America, selling a total of more than US$2.1 billion in financial stocks. These moves have brought Berkshire's cash reserves to a record US$347.8 billion, including US$305.5 billion in short-term U.S. Treasuries. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Wisconsin Investment Commission liquidates $350 million worth of Bitcoin spot ETF holdings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Wisconsin Investment Board (SWIB) completely liquidated its holdings of about 6 million shares of BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) in the first quarter of 2025, with a market value of about US$350 million at the time. The agency previously significantly increased its holdings of the ETF at the end of 2024, becoming one of the first US state pension funds to invest in Bitcoin spot ETFs. The withdrawal occurred against the backdrop of a drop of about 12% in Bitcoin prices. At the same time, Abu Dhabi sovereign wealth fund Mubadala increased its IBIT holdings to about US$409 million in the same quarter, showing that institutional investors' allocation strategies for Bitcoin ETFs have diverged. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Galaxy Digital's Nasdaq Listing Process Faces Challenges, CEO Novogratz Comments
data.description: According to Odaily, Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz expressed frustration over the company's prolonged Nasdaq listing process during an interview with CNBC. Novogratz described the experience as "un-American, unfair, and infuriating," noting that what was supposed to be a 45 to 90-day procedure extended to 1,320 days. The transaction involved nine rounds of negotiations with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Despite these challenges, Galaxy Digital emerged stronger from the ordeal. Following its Nasdaq listing, the company anticipates a 40% reduction in fees. Novogratz emphasized that Galaxy Digital aims to serve as a bridge between traditional finance and the crypto world, addressing the growing institutional demand.

data.title: ARK Invest increased its holdings of Coinbase and Bitcoin ETF in the first quarter and reduced its holdings of Tesla
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In the first quarter, the total market value of the holdings of ARK, the Ark Investment Fund led by "Wood Sister", was US$9.99 billion, and the top ten holdings accounted for 48.49% of the total market value. "Wood Sister"'s holding strategy in the first quarter showed an active layout in the fields of emerging technologies and biotechnology, while adjusting and optimizing some holdings. In the first quarter, ARK increased its holdings in AI (Palantir, UiPath), blockchain (Coinbase, Bitcoin ETF), and biotechnology (CRISPR, Teladoc), and reduced its holdings in Tesla (intensified competition) and Zoom (slowing growth). Although Tesla is still the largest holding, accounting for 8.45% of the portfolio, the size of holdings decreased slightly by 0.87% in the first quarter, which is the third consecutive quarter that Tesla has been reduced. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale deposited 200,355 LINK worth $3.27 million to Binance in the past two days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after 9 months of silence, a whale deposited 200,355 LINK worth $3.27 million to Binance in the past 2 days, making a profit of $1.08 million. 9 months ago, the whale received 345,786 LINK worth $4.56 million, and currently his wallet still holds 145,430 LINK worth $2.37 million.

data.title: Whale Resurfaces with Significant LINK Deposit After Dormancy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a cryptocurrency whale has recently made a notable transaction after a nine-month hiatus. The whale deposited 200,355 LINK tokens, valued at approximately $3.27 million, into a centralized exchange (CEX). This transaction resulted in a profit of $1.08 million.

Nine months ago, the whale had accumulated 345,786 LINK tokens for a total of $4.56 million. The whale's wallet still holds 145,430 LINK tokens, which are currently valued at around $2.37 million.

data.title: Data: clUSDL stablecoin TVL exceeds $100 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Data from DeFiLlama shows that Coinshift's yield-based stablecoin clUSDL has exceeded $100 million in total locked value (TVL) just four months after its launch in January this year, indicating the market's growing demand for fiat-pegged assets that provide passive income through decentralized financial protocols. clUSDL is built on Ethereum, earning income through on-chain lending and U.S. Treasury exposure and built on USDL, a stablecoin issued by Paxos International and regulated by Abu Dhabi. (The Block)

data.title: The first phase of Gate.io Launchpad project PFVS ended, with the total subscription exceeding 656 million USDT, exceeding the subscription by 938 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The first phase of Gate.io Launchpad project Puffverse (PFVS) has now been successfully completed, attracting more than 35,000 participants, with a total subscription amount of 656,514,966 USDT, which has been oversubscribed by 938 times.

data.title: CF Benchmarks: Ethereum bear market is over
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CF Benchmarks CEO Sui Chung said that Ethereum's recent price increase was mainly driven by short covering rather than the entry of new long funds. He pointed out that the CME Ethereum futures premium is still low, and the US-listed spot Ethereum ETF has not seen significant inflows, which indicates that the current rise is more due to traders closing short positions rather than active positioning by institutional investors. (CoinDesk)
